zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Denston於1438年出生在英國素福爾可丹斯頓時，她的父親John Denston37歲，母親Catherine Clopton34歲。她於1459年與John Broughton IV在英國藍卡爾鮑頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1481年5月30日在她的家鄉享年43歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可丹斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Denston于1438年出生在英国素福爾可丹斯頓时，她的父亲John Denston37岁，母亲Catherine Clopton34岁。她于1459年与John Broughton IV在英国藍卡爾鮑頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1481年5月30日在她的家乡享年43岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可丹斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Denston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2 English: locative name from Denston (Suffolk), which is recorded as Denardeston in 1220.

variants.name: Deniston
meanings: English: variant of Denston, a habitational name from either Denstone in Staffordshire (named from the Old English personal name Deni + tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ meaning ‘farmstead of a man called Deni’), or from Denston in Suffolk (from the Old English personal name Deneheard + tūn ‘farmstead of a man called Deneheard’).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Denston was born in 1438, in Denston, Suffolk, England, her father, John Denston, was 37 and her mother, Catherine Clopton, was 34. She married John Broughton IV in 1459, in Broughton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 30 May 1481, in her hometown, at the age of 43, and was buried in Denston, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Denston est née en 1438, à Denston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Denston, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Catherine Clopton, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé John Broughton IV en 1459, à Broughton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 30 mai 1481, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Denston, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Denston 1438 in Denston, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Denston 37 und ihre Mutter Catherine Clopton 34. Sie hat 1459 in Broughton, Lancashire, England John Broughton IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 30. Mai 1481 im Alter von 43 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Denston, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Denston è nata il nel 1438 nel Denston, Suffolk, England, sua padre, John Denston, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Catherine Clopton, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato John Broughton IV nel 1459, nel Broughton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 maggio 1481, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Denston, Suffolk, England.

ja.Denston, St Edmundsbury Borough, Suffolk: イギリスイギリススフォルクデンストン
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Denstonが1438年にイギリススフォルクデンストンで生まれた時，父John Denstonは37歳，母Catherine Cloptonは34歳であった。1459年にイギリスランカシュアイアブロウトンでJohn Broughton IVと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1481年5月30日に故郷で43歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクデンストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Denston(이)가 1438년 영국 수폴크 덴스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Denston(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Clopton(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 랭카실르 브루그h턴에서 John Broughton IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 5월 30일 그녀의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 덴스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Denston nasceu em 1438, em Denston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Denston, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Clopton, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com John Broughton IV em 1459, em Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 30 de maio de 1481, em sua cidade natal, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Denston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Denston родилась в 1438 г. в местности денстон, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Denston было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Clopton, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Broughton IV в 1459 г. в местности броугтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 30 мая 1481 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности денстон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Denston nació en 1438, en Denston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John Denston, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Catherine Clopton, tenía 34 años. Se casó con John Broughton IV en 1459, en Broughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 30 de mayo de 1481, en su pueblo, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Denston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
